data.body: PASS-1 review — T3 (Integration feasibility) [overlay]: NOT-APPLICABLE / PASS. The plan integrates only rebar's own pre-existing internal event-log substrate (reducer-skip of unknown types, compaction preserve-filter, fsck recognition of non-replay known types, write-path allow-list, attestation head-state). These are already-used internal mechanisms confirmed in the codebase (src/rebar/llm/plan_review/sidecar.py, reducer/_version.py, _store/event_append.py, _commands/compact.py, and the forward-compat tests). No external API/CLI/service/library and no asserted-but-unused capability — the overlay does not trigger. No findings.
